_comment: Channel/integration status registry (OPT-144). Metadata only — not yet consumed by code; seeds decommission planning + future status-driven route registration. Status reflects RUNTIME WIRING (scheduler/adapter/route registration in src/index.js + src/api.js), not source-dir commit recency. Verified 2026-06-14. Update when adding/retiring a channel.
_status_values: LIVE = wired into the runtime AND carrying production traffic. BETA = wired into the runtime (scheduler/adapter/routes) but low-traffic / feature-incomplete / not production-validated — NOT a safe decommission candidate. ARCHIVE = present in the tree but NOT imported/scheduled/registered anywhere in index.js/api.js — safe decommission candidate. (No ARCHIVE channels currently — all 14 are runtime-wired.)

channels.name: gmail
channels.note: Core inbox channel — poller + primary product surface

channels.name: finance
channels.note: WIRED: scheduler.register('finance-sync', 6h) [index.js:510] + registerFinanceRoutes [api.js]. LLM-expense sync, runs in prod. Small surface (1 file), low-traffic. NOT a decommission candidate.

channels.name: outlook
channels.note: WIRED: registerAdapter('outlook') [index.js:264] + client/sender. MS Graph adapter present; feature-complete but low/no active-account traffic. NOT a decommission candidate.

channels.name: transcripts
channels.note: WIRED: 'transcript-action-extractor' scheduled [index.js:808] + registerTranscriptRoutes [api.js]. Action extraction, low volume. NOT a decommission candidate.
